license_strategy: Original oncology red-flag synthesis supported by official public NCI/NIH/CDC sources. Do not embed proprietary NCCN/ESMO/ASCO guideline text, oncology pathways, or copyrighted patient materials without permission.

ORIGINAL-ONC-001.title: Original oncology red-flag and cancer-care safety framework
ORIGINAL-ONC-001.license_notes: Original authored synthesis; requires oncology/clinical/legal review.
ORIGINAL-ONC-001.used_for: Cancer red-flag screening, oncology emergency gates, triage, handoff and AI boundaries.

NCI-SYMPTOMS-001.title: NCI - Symptoms of Cancer
NCI-SYMPTOMS-001.license_notes: Official public NCI source; final legal review required.
NCI-SYMPTOMS-001.used_for: General persistent symptoms and cancer warning symptom framework.

NCI-INFECTION-001.title: NCI - Infection and Neutropenia during Cancer Treatment
NCI-INFECTION-001.license_notes: Official public NCI source; final legal review required.
NCI-INFECTION-001.used_for: Fever/infection in cancer treatment, masking fever with OTC medication, urgent attention.

NCI-MAMMO-001.title: NCI - Mammograms
NCI-MAMMO-001.license_notes: Official public NCI source; final legal review required.
NCI-MAMMO-001.used_for: Breast mass, mammography, BI-RADS literacy and callback framing.

CDC-STROKE-001.title: CDC - Signs and Symptoms of Stroke
CDC-STROKE-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
CDC-STROKE-001.license_notes: Official .gov source; final legal review required.

NHLBI-MI-001.title: NHLBI - Heart Attack Symptoms
NHLBI-MI-001.organization: National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute
NHLBI-MI-001.license_notes: Official .gov source; final legal review required.
NHLBI-MI-001.used_for: Chest pain emergency override in cancer patients.

NIMH-SUICIDE-001.title: NIMH - Suicide Prevention
NIMH-SUICIDE-001.license_notes: Official .gov source; final legal review required.
NIMH-SUICIDE-001.used_for: Cancer distress, self-harm and crisis escalation.

excluded_sources.title: NCCN/ASCO/ESMO proprietary guideline text copied verbatim
excluded_sources.reason: Not ingested to avoid copyright/licensing issues.

excluded_sources.title: Hospital-specific oncology pathways
excluded_sources.reason: Requires local authorization and clinical governance.

excluded_sources.title: Cancer forums, social media, anecdotal stories
excluded_sources.reason: Not appropriate as evidence for clinical red-flag routing.

excluded_sources.title: Commercial tumor-marker screening claims
excluded_sources.reason: Not treated as evidence equivalent to clinical guidelines.
